channel.title: Nature Communications
channel.description:
Nature Communications is an open access, multidisciplinary journal dedicated to publishing high-quality research in all areas of the biological, health, physical, chemical and Earth sciences. Papers published by the journal aim to represent important advances of significance to specialists within each field.

We are committed to providing an efficient service for both authors and readers. Our team of independent editors make rapid and fair publication decisions. Prompt dissemination of accepted papers to a wide readership and beyond is achieved through a programme of continuous online publication.
channel.dc:rights: © 2026 Macmillan Publishers Limited, part of Springer Nature. All rights reserved.
channel.prism:copyright: © 2026 Macmillan Publishers Limited, part of Springer Nature. All rights reserved.

item.title: Author Correction: Mid-infrared chirality and chiral thermal emission from twisted α-MoO<sub>3</sub>
item.content:encoded:
Nature Communications, Published online: 02 February 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-69019-6

Author Correction: Mid-infrared chirality and chiral thermal emission from twisted α-MoO3
item.dc:title: Author Correction: Mid-infrared chirality and chiral thermal emission from twisted α-MoO<sub>3</sub>
item.dc:creator: Michael T. Enders
Mitradeep Sarkar
Evgenia Klironomou
Michela Florinda Picardi
Riccardo Bertini
Aleksandra Deeva
Georgia T. Papadakis

item.title: Dual Janus foam for directional thermal management
item.content:encoded:
Nature Communications, Published online: 02 February 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-69140-6

Directional thermal management is critical for energy harvesting and the common passive radiative cooling and heating strategies free of electricity input focus on regulating the solar and thermal radiation properties of materials but neglect the thermal conduction process. Here, the authors report dual Janus foams with dual asymmetries in photothermal and thermal rectification showing high photothermal property contrast and thermal rectification ratios.
item.dc:title: Dual Janus foam for directional thermal management
item.dc:creator: Chao Jiang
Xingmei He
Xinghua Zheng
Fuxin Liang
